BR3 Cluster Phase 10 — Auto-Context System
==========================================

This bundle covers the auto-context hook pipeline for the BR3 cluster.

Key components:
- auto-context.sh: reads prompt from stdin, calls /retrieve, injects <auto-context> block
- count-tokens.sh: tokenizer-true token counting via tiktoken (cl100k_base)
- reranker.py: BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3 cross-encoder on CPU
- retrieve.py: two-stage retrieval (vector search + rerank)
- auto-context.yaml: configuration (token budget, source weights, skip patterns)

Feature gate: BR3_AUTO_CONTEXT=on (default OFF until Phase 13)

Token budget: 4096 tokens (tokenizer-true, not byte count)
Sources: research, lockwood-code, lockwood-memory, decisions
Trivial skip: <40 chars, slash commands, single-word, y/n
Ledger: ~/.buildrunner/auto-context-ledger.jsonl

This file is used as a test fixture for count-tokens.sh --model ollama.
